title: Personal settings

themeDescriptions.liquid-navy: Clear navy blue with a calm, bright workspace.
themeDescriptions.noordzee: Cool blue-green with fresh maritime accents.
themeDescriptions.bos: Deep green with natural, calm contrasts.

themeDescriptions.aubergine: Refined purple with warm, professional depth.
themeDescriptions.nacht: A complete dark theme for low-light environments.
